subject: Re: BD interview
body:
ohn called me today and asked about you.. i gave him a
great recj

--- Jen Doyle <jennifercdoyle@yahoo.com> wrote:

> Hi Jeffrey,
>    
>   I just wanted to let you know that I had my
> interview with Mr. Diller yesterday and that I think
> I would enjoy working for him, very much.  ...At
> this point, I am just waiting to hear back from IAC.
>  Thank you again, big amounts, for your
> recommendation!
>    
>   In the meantime, per usual, I never want to push
> anything, but I did email John Sykes's assistant,
> last Monday ( May 22nd)... and never heard anything
> back.  Would it be appropriate to inquire if she
> received this note, or should I just leave it alone?
>  As noted, I am, of course, hoping that IAC will
> make me an offer...but just as before, I also want
> to make sure I've looked into all my options (and
> especially, dreams) before I commit to another job
> for several years.
>    
>   I appreciate your reponse.
>    
>   Thanks for all,
>   Jen     
> 
>

body_html:
ohn called me today and asked about you.. i gave him a
great recj

--- Jen Doyle jennifercdoyle@yahoo.com wrote:

Hi Jeffrey,

I just wanted to let you know that I had my
interview with Mr. Diller yesterday and that I think
I would enjoy working for him, very much. ...At
this point, I am just waiting to hear back from IAC.
Thank you again, big amounts, for your
recommendation!

In the meantime, per usual, I never want to push
anything, but I did email John Sykes's assistant,
last Monday ( May 22nd)... and never heard anything
back. Would it be appropriate to inquire if she
received this note, or should I just leave it alone?
As noted, I am, of course, hoping that IAC will
make me an offer...but just as before, I also want
to make sure I've looked into all my options (and
especially, dreams) before I commit to another job
for several years.

I appreciate your reponse.

Thanks for all,
Jen
